CustomField.inlineHelpText: 1. Donor = Teal Gift (Click for Report) 2. Major Donor = Gold Gift (Click for Report) 3. Current Member = Blue Bookmark (Click for Report) 4. Former Member = Grey Bookmark (Click for Report) 5. Do Not Contact = Red Envelope 6. Board Member = Sheriff's Badge 7. Do Not Take Pictures = Camera 8. Deceased = Black "D"
CustomField.label: Attributes
